_comment: NOTE: This is an approximation — Tab5 is not an official Wokwi board.
PSRAM is capped at 8MB in Wokwi; Tab5 has 32MB. Touch IC (GT911) not available.
Primary dev tool: SDL2 sim (sim/). Wokwi useful for GDB + MIPI-DSI visual check.
MIPI-DSI display: ILI9881C 8-inch (closest available). Real Tab5 uses 720x1280 ST7123.
author: TinkerLabs
